raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Un Eſrus atdarrija to
Grahmatu preeſch wiſſu Lau-
schu Azzim / jo wiſſch ſtahweja
augſtaki/ ne ka wiſſi Laudis/ un
kad wiſſch to atdarrija/ ſtahweja
wiſſi Laudis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Un Eſrus teiſe to KUN.
GU/ to leelu Deewu/ un wiſſi
Laudis atbildeja Amen/ Amen/
ar Pazelſchanu ſawu Rohſu/ un
lohzijahs/ un paſtannijahs
preeſch to KUNGU ar teem
Waigeem pee Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Un Jeſuus/ un Banus/
un Serebius/ Jamins/ Akubs/
Sabtajus/ Odajus/ Maefejuus/
Klitus/ Asarijuus/ Josabads/ A-
nans/ Plajus/ un tee Lewitti/
mahzija teem Laudim to Bauf-
libu ſaprattigi/ un tee Laudis
ſtahweja ſawa Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Un tee laſſija ſaprattigi
reſſch tahs Deewa Bauslibas
Grahmatas/ un to Sapratcha-
nu iſſtabſtidami/ ka laſſoht to
warreja ſaprast.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Tad fazzija Neemiijus /
tas irr Atirſatus/ un Eſrus tas
Preesteris/ tas Raſſta-Mahzi-
tajs/ un tee Lewitti/ kas tohs
Laudis mahzija/ us wiſſeem teem
Laudim: Schi Deena irr tam
KUNGAM juhſu Deewam
ſiwehta/ ne effeet noſkummuschi/
un ne raundajt. Jo wiſſi Lau-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Tad fazzija wiſſch u
teem: Eite/ ehdeet to Tauko/
dserreet to Saldo/ un fuht
Dakka tam/ preeſſch ka nene
fataiſihts irr; Jo ſchi Deena
muhsam KUNGAM ſiweh
Tad nu ne effeet noſkummute
jo ta KUNGA Preeks irr ju
Spehks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Un tee Lewiti apkluffi
ja wiſſis Laudis/ fazzidat
Effeet kluffu/ jo ſchi Deena
ſiwehta/ tapehz ne effeet noſku
mutchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Tad gahje wiſſi Lau
ebſt un dfert / un Daltas ſ
thht/ un leelu Preeku darri
Jo tee bija tohs Wahrduß
prattufchi/ kas teem bija kaz
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Un ohtrá Deena tapu
jahs tee augſtee Tehwi no t
feem Laudim/ tee Breesteri
teemLewiteem/pee Eſruß ta N
sta-Mahzitaja/ tahs Banſli
Wahrduß klauiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Un tee atradde Bauf-
rakſitu/ ko tas KUNGS ſ
Mohſu bij paivehlejie/ ka te
Iſraeta Behrneem bij Leewe
dſihwoht uhs Swehtkeem fe
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Un ka teem bija to iſſa
zaur wiſſeem Pilſfahteem/
Jeruſaleme ſaukt un fazz
Eita abra Kalnôß/ un atne
Sarrus no Etjes-Kohkeem/
Sarrus no Swikku-Kohke
un Sarrus no Mirtu-Kohke
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
